title: pilea pumila var. deamii
intro: Pilea pumila var. deamii, also known as the Rockweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Urticaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilea pumila var. deamii are numerous, including the ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
